title: Bo Vanda's holocron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bo Vanda's holocron''' was a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] created by [[Bo Vanda]]. The [[Gatekeeper/Legends|gatekeeper]] of the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] was [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Kla (Sith)|Kla]]. It also housed the spirit of [[Komok-Da]]. Bo Vanda [[Gender/Legends|herself]] was a practitioner of [[Sith alchemy/Legends|Sith alchemy]] in the old [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. She enjoyed torturing and performing cruel experiments on captured enemies, especially [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and this contributed to her immense knowledge of alchemy. Kla, however, was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lord and Sith alchemist of the old Sith Empire from the time of the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]. He attempted to trick users of Vanda's holocron, telling them that they needed to take it to [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] to use it; in reality, he wished to go to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to gain enough strength to leave the holocron and possess the user's body. Komok-Da was one of the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith species]] and a weapons master. He had great knowledge of various weapons, including [[Sith poison]] and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Though he seemed to be an academic, in truth he would only share his knowledge with those who would kill in cold blood for that very purpose.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-02 -->''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''
